    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
    Abstract base class representing an asymmetric key pair, consisting of a public key and a private key.
    Account
    Represents a user account stored in the vault, for example an account for a given domain or service.
    AccountTest
     
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategy
    AES-based encryption strategy using Argon2 to derive a key from the user's master password.
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategyTest
     
    CreditCard
    Represents a credit or debit card stored in the vault.
    CreditCardTest
     
    EcKeyPair
    Elliptic Curve implementation of AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair.
    Main
     
    PBKDF2VaultEncryptingStrategy
    AES-based vault encryption strategy using PBKDF2 to derive a key from the user's master password.
    PBKDF2VaultEncryptingStrategyTest
     
    RsaKeyPair
    RSA implementation of AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair.
    Sharable
     
    Storable
    Represents an entity that contains one or more secrets which can be encrypted and decrypted using an VaultEncryptingStrategy.
    TestKeys
     
    Tests
     
    User
     
    Vault
     
    VaultEncryptingStrategy
    Abstract base class for symmetric encryption strategies used by the vault.
    VaultEncryptingStrategyPerformanceTest
     
    VaultObject
    Abstract base class representing an object stored in the vault.
